overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima depicting a samurai riding a horse through a foggy coastal region at night. The character travels from a rocky shoreline overlook inland along a lantern-lit dirt trail, passing through dense forest and crossing a wooden bridge.

events.description: turns left away from coastline onto inland dirt path

agents.ego_description: riding horseback along the rocky coast before turning inland toward the watchtower

entered.detail: jagged rocks along the shoreline with waves lapping below
dark ocean water visible through the fog
tall wooden watchtower with lit brazier on top
leafless tree trunk standing beside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy coastal overlook at night. The samurai rides along a rocky shoreline with the ocean visible to the right and a wooden watchtower ahead. Around the 8-second mark, the horse turns left onto an inland dirt path, leaving the immediate coastline behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open woodland trail with lantern posts

agents.ego_description: trotting steadily along the winding dirt trail past wooden lantern posts

entered.detail: sparse pine trees lining the trail
traditional wooden post with paper lantern providing warm light

segments.scene_description: Moving inland from the coast, the trail winds through open woodland. Wooden lantern posts appear along the path providing pools of warm light against the cool fog. The watchtower remains visible in the distance to the right while scattered trees begin to line the route.

events.description: entering denser forest with overhead canopy blocking the sky

agents.ego_description: riding through the darker forested section with wooden fence lining the left side of the path

entered.detail: simple wooden rail fence running alongside the trail
thick trees and undergrowth enclosing the path

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes enclosed as dense forest closes in around the path. A wooden fence appears on the left, and the sky disappears behind a thick canopy of trees. The atmosphere grows darker and more intimate as the horse continues past lantern posts.

events.description: horse steps onto wooden bridge structure crossing a dark ravine

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge at a steady pace, hooves clopping on planks

entered.detail: elevated wooden bridge with plank flooring and railings
waist-high wooden guard rails along bridge sides

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to a wooden bridge spanning a dark ravine. The horse crosses the plank structure, with wooden railings visible on both sides. Dense forest continues to surround the bridge, and a lantern glows at the far end marking the continuation of the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, foggy coastal overlook into the claustrophobic depths of a lantern-lit forest. It begins with the samurai riding along a rocky shoreline beside the ocean, passing a wooden watchtower before turning left onto an inland dirt path. As the horse moves away from the coast, the open woodland gradually tightens, with wooden lantern posts casting warm pools of light through the cool night fog. The scene then shifts as the canopy closes overhead, replacing the open sky with a dense forest and a wooden fence that hems in the trail. Finally, the path transitions onto a wooden bridge spanning a dark ravine, crossing the plank structure toward a distant glowing lantern deep within the woods.
